name: advance-codex-dev
description: [DEV] Capability plugin for strengthening Codex surfaces across skills, prompt evaluation, session folder conventions, commits, plugins, tool-use guidance, and subagent systems.

interface.shortDescription: [DEV] Strengthen skills, prompt evaluation, session folder conventions, commits, tool-use guidance, plugins, and Codex subagent systems.
interface.longDescription: [DEV] Provides skills for strengthening Codex surfaces: shaping reusable skills, empirically evaluating reusable instructions, defining session folder conventions, finalizing Codex-made changes into stable commits, isolating tool-use policy, packaging plugins, preparing bounded subagent handoffs, and designing reliable subagent workflows and custom agents.
defaultPrompt: Use $advance-codex-dev:advance-codex-dev-guide to decide whether this should become a skill, tool-use guidance layer, plugin, session folder convention, commit surface, subagent handoff gate, or subagent workflow.
Use $advance-codex-dev:plugin-creator to package a plugin and define the right bundled surfaces.
Use $advance-codex-dev:skill-creator to design a reusable Codex skill with the right references and guardrails.
Use $advance-codex-dev:empirical-prompt-tuning to evaluate and iteratively improve reusable instructions with fresh subagents, fixed scenarios, and caller-side metrics.
Use $advance-codex-dev:agents-sessions to define when artifacts belong under date-based .agents/sessions/{YYYYMMDD} instead of source, spec, or release surfaces.
Use $advance-codex-dev:git-committer to turn Codex-made changes into a task-scoped commit with strong verification and commit-message hygiene.
Use $advance-codex-dev:tool-use-guide to design reusable guidance for selecting and sequencing tools without burying tool policy inside a domain skill.
Use $advance-codex-dev:subagent-gate to prepare a subagent handoff with an exit plan, minimal context packet, ownership boundary, and approval limits before spawn or message.
Use $advance-codex-dev:subagent-creator to design a Codex subagent workflow, custom agent spec, and runtime control plan.
